title: Torrent Pharmaceuticals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Torrent Pharmaceuticals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Bengaluru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Torrent Pharmaceuticals:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Torrent Pharmaceuticals!
